reviews.review_title: Constant lag jumps and motion sickness??
reviews.review_description:
I've played a fair share of very good games on oculus, being a long time (lifelong?) gamer. Some of the best games are Asgards Wrath 2 and Batman, I had relatively high hopes for this game, looked like a kind of AC with vampire elements. Oh, I've also played through Assassin's Creed. I am always turning off motion stuff, smooth but quick turning and manual movement. This game, although not nearly as visually stunning as any I have mentioned before, lags significantly and to its extreme detriment. Doing jump attacks and even just regular from behind drains is riddled with lag spikes. How is this not optimized for the O3? I had the motion stuff on for a bit but it hindered visibility, so I turned it off and had to turn off the game less than 10 minutes later. Haven't had that on any game, ever, on O3. 
I hope they fix the lag spike issues, could be a fun game if they optimize it a bit better. The 3 I'm giving it feels too generous but maybe they fix it. Also, the explanations for how things work aren't really explain very well, better off going and playing the zombies one, as that is an absolute blast and has decent replayability.

This game is so cool and fun to play. I love it and think it's just awesome. The only thing that bugs me is that the ladders have absolutely no textures (visuals) and look super basic and stand out from the dark theme. Other than that, this game is great and has gone on sale a few times for crazy cheap. Recommend.

The game itself is enjoyable, but it occasionally experiences lags and stuttering on the Quest3, which can cause motion sickness. Additionally, it would be much more engaging and action-packed if players could actually pick up the guns and shoot back.

The game is not perfect with its occasional glitches, but it's a lot of fun to play and visually immersive. Some parts are really challenging to get through, but reading the bonus objectives on a mission like don't kill anyone or don't get spotted gives you a clue that you cannot successfully go in with "fangs blazing" and think that you will easily get through! Luckily, you can keep trying to figure it out. Thank the maker for checkpoints!

reviews.review_title: Cool game but…note for the devs
reviews.review_description: Waaaay too dark to see anything. No brightness settings in game either that I could find either. Would give 5 stars if the devs would add something to that effect!
It is a fun and challenging game to play but it does lag or glitch a lot
the game is a fun game and you should keep update on the game

This is a great game and I love the stealth genre, however I'm knocking 1 star off the review because it's now crashed twice on me after only playing it for a short time. Also, there could be more opportunities to climb and attack from height. It's no Assassin's Creed, but an enjoyable game nonetheless, especially if you like stealth.

It took me a little bit to get into this game, but once I did I really enjoyed it.  It is a stealth game, not a fighting game.  You get to be a vamp which was fun.  I liked it enough I plan on getti g other Fast Travel Games.  They have a Wraith one that looks similar.  Other reviews talk of this game being bugged and janky.  I did not experience that.

reviews.review_title: So far so good (QGO app is a must Q3)
reviews.review_description: Some stutters here and there, some bugs yada yada, but the graphics are fantastic. At times it makes me think I'm playing pcvr. Really good atmosphere and the world feels expansive in a way that I did not think was possible on a standalone headset. Haven't gotten very far into the game but very impressed.

Aside from constant crashing, there are so many different types of attacks you need to learn and remember that it takes all the fun away from the game! I didn’t come here to learn a whole new set of skills!!!

I am still in the tutorial, and frankly, i only have one issue. The god forsaken quick turn. It turns so incredibly slow, even on the fastest option. Im convinced it is some sort of troll or glitch maybe. If the devs do read this, please, for quickturn players sake, add a scroller at least ranging from ridiculously fast, to unbearably slow. Thank you, and goodbye￼

I've seen other people have problems  like crashes and others but this game is amazing smooth stealth gameplay and the hunger system makes what feels easy much harder having to worry about stealth and not being seen while eating people and not starving and the ability system is great it takes up a lot of hunger so it feels like it should be used as a last resort in tricky situations 👍  just one minor thing though, being able to jump would be nice and I know we have the blink ability it would just be nice if you could make it so you can move slower so it feels like a jump that's all though. Overall great game and amazing graphics

In most horror games you are pray and your being hunted, I like to play this game because it's different to be the hunter. I originally found the game because I thought it would be a cool Idea to be a vampire in a video game and so, I googled games like that and this one just popped up first, so I did a ton of research and found it was different and fun to watch, so I bought it and it was a good idea too.

Absolutely loved this game, just completed it today 
And had a blast, some stealth, some nice puzzles, great punch mechanics a great story, fully worth the sale price.

reviews.review_title: WTH!  can't go past the first stage!
reviews.review_description:
It didn't see anything in the description about being a hidden item game! I would have totally avoided this game had I known that it had any of that type of BS in it!

Apparently you need some kind of key to get past the first part of the first stage And there's absolutely no indication where that might be. And since it's an open world type of game there's just way too many places that it might be hiding. 

So in conclusion if you're not into hidden item games where they give little or no clues as to where any of the items are then stay away from this one!

I tried this on a free trial. Was not impressed. Then a year later on my plus subscription. Even worse. You are supposed to be a powerful vampire but your guy drops like he's made of glass. Combat is non existant. Your spotted too easily and die in 1 hit. Your powers don't activate consistently and your special vision will miss enemies right next to you. Then there's the graphics. Ok to look at but lazy. Your arms bend oddly and you grip air instead of the ledges and pipes. You can't pull enemies out of sight it's like their feet are cement let alone hide bodies. Taking down enemies sometimes calls in others who shouldn't be alerted. I haven't even gotten the crossbow yet but I'm supposed to be a friken vampire I shouldn't be wiped by masked goon #3. Any element that makes it a stealth game simply removes the fun and isn't there to make you feel like a creater of the night. After a year like this it isn't going to get better.

Edit: oh god can I give it less stars. I got it free with plus subscription and I still want my money back. Stealth is nearly impossible and not fun to begin with. Combat is non existent. I can't even finish it and it just started. So many better games you can spend your money on. Power wash simulater was more fun.

reviews.review_title: I really really want to get through this
reviews.review_description:
But there's a bug I can't get through where my life goes from full to nothing for no reason. I can't get through the level even after watching YouTube and doing it the same. 

Amy advice would be awesome because I really love it other than the few bugs

After having completed and thoroughly enjoyed Assassin‘s Creed Nexus VR, it’s difficult not to notice the imperfections and shortcomings of this title. Of course, the budget for this will only have been a fraction of what AC had. Still, the problem doesn’t lie with graphics or soundtrack (both of which are really great and very atmospheric!) but with game mechanics and world restrictions. Different to AC, you cannot climb around freely here (at least after playing for 2hrs, no idea if it changes). You also cannot properly jump, you „blink“ instead, which kills the immersion for me. 

I’ve played this via Horizon+. My 4* rating is generous, it’s likely more like a 3.4. Worth picking up only for the atmosphere when on sale, but if you’ve tried and enjoyed roaming AC‘s Venice, then this is not as enjoyable in terms of play mechanics and free movement.
Honestly, the only bad thing is how it runs, it runs at about 50fps i'd say, and im on the quest 3s, but everything else is perfect! including the graphics
I didn't care much for the story but the gameplay was good as a stealth killer. The game crashed on me 3 times throughout my playthrough though.
gave up trying to play on MQ3. lots of frame drops when turning head that ends up crashing the game. the bits that did work were decent
when i first play the trails it was fine. Now i bought it couple years later now its buggy as if i have invisible hands.
first i dont like the vigilante you cant turn it off just easy and its not good

This game is so much fun to play. Definitely worth the $ and time.   I love Sneaking up on people from above. 
 I just wish there was more to do once you beat the game.  You can go back and play the levels again.  But after you have played them a few times it gets boring.    Plz add some more to do.  This is an amazing game and I love it so much ❤️.

I killed and drank the blood of so many rats and one person in that time. It's a blast!

I had no issues with the gameplay in that amount of time. I am using Quest games optimizer as well (love it!).

UPDATE - this game is amazing. I could play it all the time. The heightened senses is so much fun and you feel a little bit like a witch or wizard and people that said it is boring must be dead inside!

The concept is good, so is the art work and audio.  I enjoyed the game for the most part, but the bugginess of various aspects distracts from the immersion.  Also, it says "comfortable" presumably because you can teleport, but it's a complete lie- it would be utterly impossible to even complete the first boss battle without using smooth locomotion mainly because the teleport is time limited (cooldown).  You have to set the motion speed to max speed because you wouldn't be able to get out of the way of incoming fire- and you'd have no chance without strafing motions.  So if you suffer from motion sickness, do not believe the comfortable rating, it's nonsense.

Regarding the bugs:
1. the male character is built off the female model which resulted in a variety of bugs:
  - the shoulder width is quite narrow so the arms were always in weird distracting positions in front of my face whenever climbing/hanging with hands above your head
  - a few spots in the character voice monologues were done in the female voice (pretty sloppy)
  - there's a couple "jungle gym" climbing spots and the character's reach is less than mine (I'd reach out and her/his hand would stop short of where I really reached to).  Makes sense if the character model is a smaller woman but you're not displaying the body so why not just let my reach be my reach?
2. the teleport is often wonky.  Sometimes it works just fine, other times you're pushing the button and the position indicator refuses to appear even on flat surfaces right next to you.  If you quit the game and start it up again, then it'll work again where it was refusing to before.
3. sometimes the game seems to get confused about locked doors.  I got a key to let some guy out of his cell, and after I got the key the lock icon disappeared from the cell door and the handle would turn but you couldn't actually open the door.

There's more, but I'm rating a 4 because it's fun and VR games have a smaller audience/budget so bugs happen more.
The game keeps kicking me out. Can you fix it or give me a refund

I’m not gonna glaze it, it had its problems but in all the game was fun. Instead of playing a vampire hunter you are the vampire. I love the powers and the mobility. I really recommend this game. And they devs should totally make another “Vampire the masquerade” game

Great game! Only one little issue that's bothering me: when you use the cloak, you have to press continuously A with your right thumb, then you can't turn as you'd use right thumb for that. So you go cloak and can't properly move to avoid an enemy, which feels wrong.

It's kinda everything VR was designed to do, immersive story, good narrative voices etc.  long duration puzzles to solve, sandbox to climb around in and whatever, I would give it seven stars if I could.

It's great and the best vampire vr game ever

reviews.review_title: The controls makes the game unplayable
reviews.review_description: The stealth gameplay is nice, but the first boss fight is where the game falls apart. The controls are so imprecise that I found it impossible to progress. I ended up giving up and don't recommend purchasing this game.

reviews.review_title: WOW what an up and down, love it but
reviews.review_description:
First off I love this game because I love the premise and I think it is a very beautiful well put together game. I think it's too much for the Quest 3 though. It's janky. idk if you guys got to get rid of some stuff or whatever cuz I don't make games, but I do play games and I do know what the majority of games feel and play like. 

I have mixed reviews about the puzzles. specifically the fill cups. That was very very confusing and I didn't understand about the skulls, how you can't move but you're expected to like not die, I thought when the skulls show up it meant that I made a wrong choice! honestly idk how you guys wouldn't think to think of that because, you can't move. You can't move and you'll die if you go in two rooms so, wouldn't that make it look like you're getting punished for making a wrong choice? 

 One small part of the game but it really upset me and made me feel like I couldn't do anything to win. of course teleporting was the answer but I still don't understand it because I was never explained about the skulls or not being able to move.... I mean come on guys, you got to play through it and experience from a subjective view so when you're doing a puzzle, there's punishment and rewards. when you pick the right room and you can't move and you get attacked, two of those attacks kills you, it's really going to feel like you're making a wrong decision. whether you can teleport out of it or fight back or not.

I had the YouTube it and watch somebody else actually go through it a couple times and get frustrated lol, and then just realize you just teleport away. with pretty much everything else in the game having meaning and some type of direction, this just felt really lost. 

The dinner table cups were amazing I have to give you props. You had me frustrated but it was because of my own impatience. once you go back and read the books slower and carefully, you can see the order. 

really hope this helps because I would give you a one star if I didn't want it to do good, I'll probably change the review to a four or five but I really really think if you guys read this and fix the janky You will have a AAA award-winning style game.
but i am stuck where your supposed to kill Elena, after her dialogue nothing happens

even in the tutorial grabbing the phone was legitimate hard since it kept putting my hands in one position when moving them.

You are meant to be a vampire and you can't take 2 bullets? You die standing up and don't fall to the ground? you punch someone and it doesnt connect so your hand just goes straight through them. 2 stars as good voice acting.

I really wanted to love this game - the concept and setting sounds like it would be amazing and it probably is for people who don’t get motion sickness. However I tried ‘Blink’ but it gets stuck so many times it’s virtually unusable. It shouldn’t really be rated “Comfortable”.
It's just not for me
Nice game, good atmosphere, but most of the guards are armed with swords and guns. I think it could be more diverse. like the bosses had different mechanics.
I am Justice

Yes, very happy with this. Well worth the money. I highly recommend 👍

So I’ve gotten to ply maybe 1 or 2 hours of it and that time was pretty fun. Now here is the but, I tried to lid into the game today no I’m stuck on n infinite loading screen. The game is definitely a 5 star but with not actually being able to play it is not a win for it. I’m really only writing a review to maybe get a possible fix for it, cause this game is pretty good. 

Edit/New review: my previous score is still standing (possibly less) because now the issue I had previously has been fixed at least for me. This time it is because of almost constant frame drops from a game that isn’t really graphically advanced, the style is good and reminds me of Dishonored and I like it but I don’t think there should be so many frame drops and physics quality drops. There is also duplicat icons while falling which isn’t a huge deal to me personally. 

As of right now that’s about all I got to say about the game. I do think it’s fun still but it needs more polish to be finished.

This game is way too expensive for what it delivers. It crashes multiple times during gameplay ￼ the controls are non-responsive and persnickety ￼ I really wanted to like it￼, after all, it looks very much like assassins Creed, ￼ The concept is good but there is no multiplayer function. There are not enough levels, the whole game you’re going around and gathering these skills, but the game isn’t long enough for you to gather all the skills.￼ and here’s a spoiler alert you learn all of these skills in the game for it to turn into a boxing match essentially with the last character and are not able to use your skills whatsoever other than the teleport function which works half the time maybe. Like I said, it was not worth the price not even close￼. however if they fix the glitches and the bugs added more  functionality to the game the storyline wasn’t too bad. with the proper tooling this game could be resurrected. ￼ I think the developers owe it to the people who purchased it for 30 bucks a free patch that expands the game and delivers a better experience. ￼
Watch my playthrough on YouTube @APEboys
A rare sight on the Quest: a true AAA title that is genuinely high-quality, well-designed, and makes great use of VR capabilities. And yes, another rarity — it has an excellent difficulty balance.

It has all the vibe of Vampire: The Masquerade: Bloodlines in an immersive environment. I loved it.

The music, atmosphere, intrigue, artwork, characters, and gameplay make it one of my favorite VR games so far. 

Give it a try!

The game looks nice and I like Venice but the controls are very unintuitive and hard to use. Took me 25 minutes to answer the phone in the first interactive in the game and there are no instructions. Control settings were not descriptive. Combat is unexplained and objects sometimes bug out. The first key hung in mid air and I could not interact with it had to reload from save twice

reviews.review_title: Good game under all bugs and stuttering
reviews.review_description:
Do i like this game? Kinda yea...but with all stuttering and even crashing to home environment and one even basically i couldn't exit the game (even after restarting i saw the game logo for second) the asw is ..bad  and from i saw ..no future updates or anything...so if you going to buy.... maybe wait for huge discount or something

Now for good things i liked the art style and some area really well done and not linear...(sadly it's linear most if time) voice acting is very nice 
It have potential but sadly i think they just left it so beware before buying

On the water fill up part going to Pietro's cell, the climbing is terrible and unresponsive, after ten tries of insta dying because something I grabbed didn't actually grab, can't do it. Unacceptable design, the climbing is not good enough for climbing under stress.  Besides that, no brightness setting, so I can barely see anything. Hit detection is bad, I punch someone and half the time my fist slides around their body doing nothing. Getting the feeding bonus is janky, I have to practically jerk my head away to consistently get it (great for my neck). The level design itself, like I said, is terrible, I'm never sure if I'm going the right way. Almost directly before the part I couldn't pass I was stuck for ten minutes because there was a switch next to a red light that may seem obvious if you know it's there, but there are major problems with that thought process, red doesn't mean progress, the light itself with the low brightness was obscuring the visibility of the switch, the multiple useless door and grates everywhere with practically none being important but for no obvious reason or signage that specific one is, an electrical switch underwater that is still operational to open a pathway in a sewer is just unrealistic and unexpected (the Easter egg in this area is actually more of an expected level design here, I found that immediately).

I just started playing it last night so I’m around 5 hours in and I’ve love every minute of it. I’m enjoying the different forms of attack. It is a linear game so there isn’t a lot of exploration but it is worth exploring what is available. I go through all the random doors & windows I can. You often find keys to locked doors or collectibles inside that add to the story in the form of pictures,letters,etc. I love the upgradable skill tree,it adds light RPG mechanics to the game. It has a really cool atmosphere in Vince,Italy that mixes it up between the city,the sewers and canals. It is an adult themed game,so I don’t recommend it for children. To make a long story short,I highly recommend this game

What can I say a great stealth action Game with vampires to boot .
Reminds me of the games I use to play years ago on PS2/3 like Blood Rayne PS2 ?
I love it and it gets five stars from me.

I found this game by looking for a VR experience reminiscent of Assassin’s Creed Nexus set in Venice. The game’s graphics are undeniably impressive, capturing the eerie beauty of Venice’s streets and canals. The atmosphere is immersive, making exploration during the dark hours genuinely captivating. 

However, the overall user experience shortcomings detract from the potential enjoyment of the game. For example, the loading timesare notably long, disrupting immersion and testing patience.

I played up to the “Two Twin” mission, which I estimate is about 40-50% into the game. Unfortunately, I found myself losing interest due to the frustrating mechanics and lack of engaging content beyond the visual appeal. While wandering through Venice at midnight was a highlight, the overall gameplay did not meet expectations.

Considering the price, if you’re primarily interested in a visually rich VR representation of Venice, it might be worth exploring.

I really expected to enjoy this game, especially as a Dishonored fan, which is clearly what this gameplay and art style is based upon. Unfortunately it is let down by a weak character (combined with awkward controls for use of powers) who all too often seems unable to actually cope with the obstacles put in the player's way. You know what you want or need to do to get by, but the powers are crap, unavailable etc. It just became a chore to try and work with what you've got.

I really want to give this incredible game 5 stars, but at times the game is too frustrating !
There is no difficulty setting, no way to bypass boss fights…
The fight with the twins is way too difficult (or you have to guess what is the exact way to do it right…) making the game experience a love-hate relationship…
Being forced into this for a « stealth » game is not acceptable…
It seems like a good game but I can't download it!!!!!

I had to lower my current review to two stars down from four. I went back to do another playthrough on this game and it's nearly unplayable because of frame drops and stuttering I've tried everything to fix it but to no avail. It's on all three of my quest headsets. I've reached out for technical support and have received no answers as to why this game no longer functions properly. I'm not sure if it's a meta problem or a developer problem it might have something to do with asynchronous space warping I'm just not sure. I think until this game has been fixed and smooth it out I wouldn't recommend it to people it would just make them mad to play it
The plot and characters was really engaging. The game play was fun and challenging at times. Amazing game. Will be playing again.

I wish that I could give it 5 stars but there’s a few small things that prevents me from doing so. First, the good part: it’s a great stealth game. If you like sneaking around, you’re going to like this game. I really didn’t have a problem with the computer ai as other people have mentioned. For the most part, I thought it was pretty good. The story ranges from good to confusing. Some missions don’t really make much sense in terms of story line but it never stopped me from playing on. Now I really like this game and the reason that I can’t give 5 stars  it’s not the most polished game. The first thing is that the environments are not wide open. You have to coordinate through a path but you can take different routes through the path: whether you go up high or around foes. The next thing is bugs. Not many but you’ll come across a few. The last thing is the long and numerous load times. The load times are longer than most other games. These small things prevent me from giving that extra star but the gameplay itself is 5 stars
for me is this game best vr game ever i you can be vampire and i love vampires and i buy this game for 14,99€ i love this game 👍😉🤝🧛🧛‍♀️

reviews.review_title: Ruined by glitches and awkward controls
reviews.review_description: I’m not sure which systems the great reviews for this game are coming from, but it isn’t the Quest 2.  This game could have been great, but the developers seemed to stop caring once they got it to “playable”.  There are so many things wrong with this game, I’m not even sure where to start.  Basically, the movements in-game aren’t appropriately matched to your movements IRL.  You try to grab a NPC, instead you punch them.  You try to bite a NPC, instead you throw them through(?) your characters body, behind you.  You try to grab/climb in game and your hand looks fine, but the arm is glitching all over, you release the grip to move the hand, the hand starts glitching too, you grab, you fall, you die.  On top of that, the game is shorter than expected, the environment isn’t very explorable despite being a large part of Venice (above ground and below), and the awkward controls make the boss fights more difficult than they would be otherwise.  I think this game was more about cashing in on an established brand than it is about making something that respects that brand or contributes to it (or it’s fans) in any meaningful way.

Simply, slow play, vampire can die from a punch, doesn't track side quests of not being seen, etc. You are led through the game,  no freedom. Not alot of variety...I LOVE vampires and this was terrible, vampire can die from stepping in water....water....redundant... Haven't have it long conquered it...easy...childishness...terrible... wish I could get my money back
Every time  I play the first part of the game it keeps kicking me out back meta Home Screen how can I enjoy and play this devs fix this issue please crashes on me everytime first part of the game  ￼

I should say that I like it much more than Batman. 
- Story is deep and interesting.
- Level of immersion is awesome.
- Absolutely great stealth and combat that we can mix up.
- Impressive skills/abilities.
- Great progression system.
- Additional challenges per mission.
- Very interactive environment. 
- We can use various styles to deal with enemies, NO restrictions to any particular style or tactic.
- Interesting puzzles. 
- Absolutely great optimization and performance.

This is such an impressive adventure.🤝
Every time i use teleport or even grab someone my game just lags and i end up being killd. Cant even play the game on my quest 3s

I bought this game maybe nearly half a year ago, I think the game is decent and yet I like some aspects of combat in the game. Overall I really enjoyed the story elements even though most of it I skipped because I wanted to get to the game play quicker. Also didn't really like the loading screens.

The game could be very buggy to the point where it's unplayable, Then there's a lack of enemy Verity, It gets really repetitive and boring at some parts with some boss fights even being unplayable too. Also finish the game at Venice but I'm not sure if the game still continues after that I've heard it does but my game's been stuck in Venice.

The stealth in the game is ok as well It's not greatest, unless you have the world's stilist hands then it might be easy. but it's kind of hard when you can just skip through half of the map by just like teleporting.

But some other parts of the game are good like the MC and the German which I briefly touched upon the story and that's really it.



Solid 6.5 out of 10
